allow: Bash(node -e 'const { PrismaClient } = require\('\\''@prisma/client'\\''\); const p = new PrismaClient\(\); p.$queryRaw`SHOW TABLES`.then\(r => { console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r, null, 2\)\); return p.$disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); return p.$disconnect\(\); }\);')

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import\('\\''./src/config/prisma.js'\\''\).then\(async \({ prisma }\) => { try { const tables = await prisma.$queryRaw`SHOW TABLES`; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(tables\)\); } catch \(e\) { console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'', e.message\); } finally { await prisma.$disconnect\(\); } }\);')

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import\('\\''./src/config/prisma.js'\\''\).then\(async \({ prisma }\) => { try { const cols = await prisma.$queryRaw`SHOW COLUMNS FROM productvariant`; console.log\('\\''PV:'\\'', JSON.stringify\(cols\)\); const productCols = await prisma.$queryRaw`SHOW COLUMNS FROM product`; console.log\('\\''P:'\\'', JSON.stringify\(productCols\)\); } catch \(e\) { console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'', e.message\); } finally { await prisma.$disconnect\(\); } }\);')

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import\('\\''./src/config/prisma.js'\\''\).then\(async \({ prisma }\) => { const tables = ['\\''order'\\'','\\''orderitem'\\'','\\''product'\\'','\\''productmedia'\\'','\\''productoption'\\'','\\''productoptionvalue'\\'','\\''producttag'\\'','\\''productvariant'\\'','\\''user'\\'']; for \(const t of tables\) { const cols = await prisma.$queryRawUnsafe\(`SHOW COLUMNS FROM ${t}`\); console.log\('\\''=== '\\'' + t + '\\'' ==='\\''\); console.log\(cols.map\(c => `${c.Field} ${c.Type}${c.Null==='\\''NO'\\''?'\\'' NOT NULL'\\'':'\\'''\\''}${c.Key?'\\'' ['\\''+c.Key+'\\'']'\\'':'\\'''\\''}${c.Default!==null?'\\'' DEFAULT '\\''+c.Default:'\\'''\\''}`\).join\('\\''\\n'\\''\)\); } await prisma.$disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e\); process.exit\(1\); }\);')

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import\('\\''./src/config/prisma.js'\\''\).then\(async \({ prisma }\) => { const tables = ['\\''order'\\'','\\''orderitem'\\'','\\''productmedia'\\'','\\''productoption'\\'','\\''productoptionvalue'\\'','\\''producttag'\\'','\\''user'\\'']; for \(const t of tables\) { const cols = await prisma.$queryRawUnsafe\('\\''SHOW COLUMNS FROM `'\\''+t+'\\''`'\\''\); console.log\('\\''=== '\\'' + t + '\\'' ==='\\''\); console.log\(cols.map\(c => c.Field + '\\'' '\\'' + c.Type + \(c.Null==='\\''NO'\\''?'\\'' NOT NULL'\\'':'\\'''\\''\) + \(c.Key?'\\'' ['\\''+c.Key+'\\'']'\\'':'\\'''\\''\) + \(c.Default!==null?'\\'' DEFAULT '\\''+c.Default:'\\'''\\''\)\).join\('\\''\\n'\\''\)\); } await prisma.$disconnect\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);')

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import\('\\''./src/config/prisma.js'\\''\).then\(async \({ prisma }\) => { try { const rows = await prisma.$queryRaw`SELECT migration_name, finished_at, rolled_back_at FROM _prisma_migrations`; console.log\('\\''migrations table rows:'\\'', JSON.stringify\(rows\)\); } catch \(e\) { console.log\('\\''migrations table not present or errored:'\\'', e.message\); } await prisma.$disconnect\(\); }\);')

Bash(node --input-type=module -e 'import\('\\''./src/config/prisma.js'\\''\).then\(async \({ prisma }\) => { try { const products = await prisma.product.findMany\({ include: { media: true, tags: true, options: { include: { values: true } }, variants: { include: { selections: { include: { option: true, optionValue: true } } } } }, orderBy: { createdAt: '\\''desc'\\'' }, take: 3 }\); console.log\('\\''OK: fetched'\\'', products.length, '\\''products'\\''\); if \(products[0]\) { const p = products[0]; console.log\('\\''sample:'\\'', JSON.stringify\({ id: p.id, title: p.title, media: p.media.length, tags: p.tags.length, options: p.options.length, variants: p.variants.length, firstVariantStatus: p.variants[0]?.status, firstVariantSku: p.variants[0]?.sku }\)\); } } catch \(e\) { console.error\('\\''ERR:'\\'', e.message\); process.exitCode = 1; } finally { await prisma.$disconnect\(\); } }\);')
